pullQuote: I build software that scales—from thoughtful user experiences to resilient systems behind the scenes.
paragraph: I'm a full-stack developer based in Cebu City, Philippines, and a Magna Cum Laude graduate with a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology. I enjoy building modern, user-focused applications from concept to deployment, combining intuitive user experiences with reliable, scalable systems. I'm passionate about clean architecture, maintainable code, and solving complex problems through thoughtful engineering. My goal is to create softwares that are not only functional and efficient but also deliver lasting value to the people who use it.
